mdRecord.dcterms:title: James C. Biddle to Gertrude G. Meredith, September 25, 1862
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Major James C. Biddle writes to Gertrude G. Meredith from a camp near Strasburg, discussing military news, his hopes of spending the winter together, and where Meredith should send future letters.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-1865
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Biddle, James C.
